ai_role: Hyperscaler, AI model platform, TPU owner, search and cloud AI operator
tvs_tiebreaker: TVS should dominate because GOOG is more AI platform/operator than pure supply-chain chokepoint.
technical_timing_rule: Technicals guide add pacing, but core ownership should be driven by fundamentals and AI platform durability.
rationale: Google is not a pure chokepoint supplier, but it owns scarce AI assets: distribution, data, models, cloud infrastructure, and custom TPU capability. Risk sits in search monetization, regulation, and cloud execution.
